about.sub_title: Premier Exporter of Premium Used Agricultural Equipment
about.p1: Based in Japan, Pyramid Japan Corp. stands as a trusted global supplier of elite used agricultural machinery. We specialize in sourcing and exporting high-capacity tractors, precision combine harvesters, specialized sugar harvesters, and high-tech field implements tailored to worldwide farming standards.
about.p2: Our engineering team carefully screens each piece of heavy equipment to ensure peak hydraulic performance and field readiness. We bridge the gap between premium Japanese equipment sources and international agricultural enterprises.
about.card_desc: Field-ready machinery exported directly from professional Japanese agricultural hubs.
about.adv1_desc: Every tractor, combine harvester, and sugarcane rig undergoes intensive multi-point mechanical and hydraulic testing before export.
about.adv2_desc: Expert handling of oversized farm machinery, including professional dismantling, heavy container loading, and ocean freight.
about.adv3_desc: Direct sourcing from premium Japanese dealer networks and auction houses, ensuring genuine parts and pristine operational hours.

ag_cta.title: Ready to Have Your Next Japanese Tractor?
ag_cta.desc: We streamline the entire export pipeline for agricultural machinery. From complete PTO testing to secure seaport container loading, get farm-ready units delivered directly to your region.
ag_cta.box1_desc: Receive our complete live agricultural catalog including multi-angle field photos and complete engine test documentation.
ag_cta.box2_desc: Need a specific horse-power (HP) rating or specialized rotary attachments? Connect with our sourcing experts in Japan.

questions.q: What technical checks do you perform on Japanese used tractors?
questions.a: Every tractor undergoes a comprehensive multi-point inspection, including full Power Take-Off (PTO) operational tests, hydraulic lift load-testing, 4WD engagement checks, and a complete analysis of engine compression and fluid levels.

questions.q: Are the rotary tillers and farm attachments included in the price?
questions.a: Many of our Japanese used tractors come directly with their original rotary tillers attached. The exact pricing and inclusion of tillers or backhoes will be clearly labeled on each specific machinery stock sheet.

questions.q: Which agricultural machinery brands do you primarily export?
questions.a: We specialize in exporting Japan's most reliable and universally trusted farm brands, primarily focusing on Kubota, Yanmar, Iseki, and Mitsubishi machinery, ensuring high parts availability worldwide.

questions.q: Can you pack additional farming components or spare parts inside the shipment?
questions.a: Yes. For wholesale buyers and farm cooperatives, we can source and secure extra replacement filters, tines, blades, and basic maintenance kits directly inside the container or tractor cabin to help optimize your shipping costs.

ag_hero.desc: Source highly reliable, multi-functional, and fuel-efficient used agricultural equipment directly from Japan. Tailored for maximum harvest productivity and small-to-large scale farming.

machinery.hero_desc: Discover certified high-performance equipment imported directly from Japan.
machinery.no_machines: No active machinery matching your filter options.

questions.q: How do you verify the actual working hours of the machinery?
questions.a: Every machine listed in our construction inventory undergoes strict digital and mechanical hour-meter checks. We also verify the historical service logs from the original Japanese owners to ensure 100% data authenticity.

questions.q: Can you provide specific detail reports on hydraulic and engine pressure?
questions.a: Yes. For every piece of heavy equipment (Excavators, Loaders, Dozers), we provide comprehensive hydraulic pressure tests, engine blow-by inspection reports, and operational high-definition videos before procurement.

questions.q: Are undercarriage and track conditions inspected?
questions.a: Absolutely. Undercarriage links, pins, bushings, rollers, and shoes are carefully measured and documented. The remaining life expectancy (percentage) of the undercarriage or rubber tracks is detailed in the item sheet.

questions.q: Do you offer spare parts support for the construction machinery sold?
questions.a: Yes, Pyramid Japan Co. Ltd provides genuine spare parts backup and support. We can pack critical replacement filters, seals, and wear parts inside the machinery cabin or container prior to international shipment.

con_hero.desc: Explore Japan's most reliable and strictly inspected used construction equipment. From heavy-duty excavators to high-capacity loaders, we deliver machinery built to conquer any job site.
con_hero.card1_desc: Rigorous hydraulic pressure and structural tests included
con_hero.card2_desc: Direct sourcing with transparent service logs

maintenance_cta.title: Need a Custom Inspection Report Before Shipping?
maintenance_cta.desc: Our team of senior Japanese engineers is ready to prepare custom diagnostic reports for your target machinery. Ensure your field operations stay 100% efficient from day one.

card1.title: Schedule Custom Test
card1.desc: Request specific cylinder pressure tests, engine blow-by videos, or digital multi-point diagnostics for your fleet.

card2.title: Technical Consultation
card2.desc: Unsure about parts compatibility or modification requirements for your local climate? Speak to our workshop foreman.

faq1.q: Are your workshop engineers officially certified in Japan?
faq1.a: Yes. All maintenance and diagnostic overhauls at Pyramid Japan are conducted by senior mechanics certified under strict Japanese automotive and heavy machinery engineering standards, ensuring world-class execution.

faq2.q: Do you supply non-OEM or aftermarket spare parts if requested?
faq2.a: Our standard inventory is 100% genuine OEM to maximize machinery lifetime. However, upon specific enterprise customer requests, we can source high-grade, certified Japanese aftermarket components to suit your budget.

faq3.q: Can I get a live video feed of my machine's hydraulic pressure test?
faq3.a: Absolutely. Transparency is our core value. Once a maintenance or pre-export check is ordered, we can arrange a live streaming session or send high-definition unedited video reports of the gauge meters at maximum load.

faq4.q: What is your typical turnaround time for air-freighting critical spare parts?
faq4.a: For in-stock components, parts are packed and dispatched via premium air couriers (DHL/FedEx) within 48 hours of payment verification, reaching most global main ports and hubs within 5 to 7 business days.

maintenance_hero.desc: Ensure long-term operational uptime. Our certified Japanese engineers perform complete diagnostic overhauls, engine calibrations, and hydraulic rebuilding before any machine leaves our yards.

cards.card1_desc: Full structural stress and crack testing
